items.name: バイキング号キャプスタンを台座にした灯篭と錨

en.name_romaji: Baikingu-gō Kyapusutan o Daiza ni shita Tōrō to Ikari
en.name_en: Lantern Mounted on the Capstan of the Ship Viking, and Anchor
en.description_en: A craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is village-designated by Mikurajima Village, Tokyo, with designation dated February 1, 2006. It is located in Mikurajima Village.

items.name: 御蔵の大ジイ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A notable tree in the monuments category (historic sites, places of scenic beauty, and natural monuments). It is village-designated by Mikurajima Village, Tokyo, with designation dated October 31, 2012. It is located in Mikurajima Village.
